configurePresets.name: prebuilt
configurePresets.description: Downloads a prebuilt Skia bundle from R2 (no Skia compile). Falls back with a clear message if the bundle is incompatible; use the 'source' preset then.

configurePresets.name: source
configurePresets.displayName: Skia — build from source via vcpkg
configurePresets.description: Builds Skia (and deps) from source via the vcpkg toolchain. Use when the prebuilt bundle is unavailable/incompatible, or to produce a bundle.
